title: Debris Outline
body:

|  _ \| ____| __ )|  _ \|_ _/ ___|   / _ \| | | |_   _| |   |_ _| \ | | ____|
| | | |  _| |  _ \| |_) || |\___ \  | | | | | | | | | | |    | ||  \| |  _|  
| |_| | |___| |_) |  _ < | | ___) | | |_| | |_| | | | | |___ | || |\  | |___ 
|____/|_____|____/|_| \_\___|____/   \___/ \___/  |_| |_____|___|_| \_|_____|

This texture pack adds a **bright, neon-green outline** to the **Ancient Debris** block, making it significantly easier to spot while mining in the Nether.  
Perfect for players who want faster resource hunting without altering the block’s original look and feel.

### Features
- Vibrant neon-green highlight  
- Improved visibility in dark Nether environments  
- Lightweight and compatible with most visual packs  
- Preserves the block’s core texture
